title: sideroxylon socorrense
intro: Sideroxylon socorrense, also known as the Socorrense Ironwood, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Sideroxylon socorrense has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as wound healing, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Sideroxylon socorrense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
